generated_oml:
// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT temperature sensor deployed in physical building infrastructure for real-time environmental monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT occupancy sensor tracking human presence in building spaces for adaptive control policies"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance LightSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT light sensor measuring ambient lighting conditions for visual comfort optimization"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightDataTransmitted
]

instance EnergyMeter : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Energy consumption meter providing real-time power usage data for building systems"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance LightDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightSensor
]

instance EnergyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyMeter
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BimModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Building Information Model serving as semantic backbone enriched with device metadata and control logic"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BimToDigitalTwinConverter
]

instance SensorMetadata : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Device metadata including sensor/actuator configurations and control logic extracted from BIM"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted, OccupancyDataTransmitted, LightDataTransmitted, EnergyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BimToDigitalTwinConverter
]

instance RealTimeBuildingData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Normalized runtime data from IoT sensors and operational systems processed for DT synchronization"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted, OccupancyDataTransmitted, LightDataTransmitted, EnergyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoConnector, EclipseDittoManager
]

instance VisualizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization model created using Unreal Engine 5 for immersive monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngine5Renderer
]

instance ReinforcementLearningModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BOREALIS reinforcement learning model optimizing energy consumption, visual comfort, and health effects"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ControlPolicyOptimizer
]

instance LightingControlLogic : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "TwinLight domain-specific control semantics for adaptive lighting strategies embedded in BIM"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo LightingControlServiceEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance EclipseHonoConnector : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono providing real-time edge connectivity and data exchange between physical sensors and DT"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataSynchronizationService
]

instance EclipseDittoManager : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto managing digital twin instances and enabling bidirectional communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables DigitalTwinManagementService, ControlPolicyExecutionService
]

instance BimToDigitalTwinConverter : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-driven engineering tool automating DT deployment from BIM models with device metadata"
    DTDFVocab:enables AutomatedDeploymentService
]

instance UnrealEngine5Renderer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 providing rich, interactive visualization capabilities for DT monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:enables InteractiveVisualizationService
]

instance ControlPolicyOptimizer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BOREALIS reinforcement learning framework for iterative refinement of control policies"
    DTDFVocab:enables AdaptiveControlService
]

instance LightingControlServiceEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TwinLight integration layer for lighting system configurations directly from BIM models"
    DTDFVocab:enables LightingOptimizationService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeDataSynchronizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service handling bidirectional real-time synchronization between physical building and DT via Eclipse Hono/Ditto"
    DTDFVocab:provides PhysicalStateInsight, DataConsistencyAction
]

instance DigitalTwinManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service managing DT instances and their lifecycle operations through Eclipse Ditto"
    DTDFVocab:provides TwinStateInsight, ConfigurationManagementAction
]

instance AutomatedDeploymentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service generating runtime artifacts from BIM models via model-to-model transformations"
    DTDFVocab:provides DeploymentArtifactInsight, DeploymentAutomationAction
]

instance InteractiveVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing immersive 3D monitoring and simulation of building operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualMonitoringInsight, SimulationAction
]

instance AdaptiveControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service executing reinforcement learning-based control policies for building systems"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight, ComfortOptimizationAction
]

instance LightingOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service optimizing energy use and visual comfort through adaptive lighting control"
    DTDFVocab:provides LightingEfficiencyInsight, EnergySavingAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance PhysicalStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time representation of physical building state synchronized with digital twin"
]

instance DataConsistencyAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated validation of data consistency between physical and virtual representations"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance TwinStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Current state and configuration of all digital twin instances"
]

instance ConfigurationManagementAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic adjustment of DT configurations without full redeployment"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DeploymentArtifactInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Generated runtime artifacts ready for DT deployment"
]

instance DeploymentAutomationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated generation and deployment of DT artifacts from BIM models"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance VisualMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization of building operations and performance metrics"
]

instance SimulationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Execution of building operation simulations for predictive analysis"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EnergyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for energy consumption optimization based on reinforcement learning"
]

instance ComfortOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of building systems to maintain optimal visual comfort and health effects"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance LightingEfficiencyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Performance metrics for lighting system energy efficiency and visual comfort"
]

instance EnergySavingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated implementation of energy-saving strategies through adaptive lighting control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C2: Acting Components
instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building Control System actuator controlling lighting systems with adaptive strategies"
]

instance HvacController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Programmable Logic Controller managing HVAC systems with reinforcement learning policies"
]

instance BuildingControlSystem : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Central Building Control System integrating all actuators and controllers for building operations"
    base:contains LightingActuator, HvacController
]

// C10: Additional Models/Data
instance PostOccupancySensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Historical sensor data used for iterative refinement of control policies in BOREALIS project"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted, OccupancyDataTransmitted, LightDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ControlPolicyOptimizer
]

instance PerformanceGapAnalysisData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Comparison data between design specifications and operational performance"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RealTimeBuildingData
]

// C6: Additional Services
instance EnergyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing predictive analytics for energy optimization across building systems"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight, EnergySavingAction
]

instance AutomatedCommissioningService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service reducing manual configuration efforts through automated BCS component commissioning"
    DTDFVocab:provides CommissioningStatusInsight, ConfigurationAutomationAction
]

instance ControlPolicyExecutionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service executing optimized control policies back to physical building systems"
    DTDFVocab:provides PolicyExecutionInsight, ControlSignalAction
]

// C17: Additional Insights/Actions
instance CommissioningStatusInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Status of automated commissioning processes for building control components"
]

instance ConfigurationAutomationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated configuration of building control system components"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance PolicyExecutionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Execution status of control policies in physical building systems"
]

instance ControlSignalAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Transmission of control signals from DT to physical building actuators"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The **virtual-to-physical interaction** involves the DT generating **control signals, optimization commands, or adaptive policies** that are transmitted back to the physical building. These outputs are executed via **actuators and controllers** (e.g., lighting systems, HVAC) integrated into the BIM model. The **TwinLight** project enables **automated commissioning** of control logic, while **BOREALIS** uses **reinforcement learning** to dynamically adjust control policies based on real-time feedback. The DT framework ensures **low-latency communication** through **Eclipse Hono/Ditto**, enabling seamless execution of virtual decisions in the physical domain."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The **twinning time-scale** is **real-time**, with continuous synchronization between the physical building and its DT. The framework supports **sub-second latency** for critical operations (e.g., lighting control) and **near-real-time updates** for broader monitoring tasks. The **ODTE metric** evaluates the entanglement quality, ensuring high fidelity in synchronization. The **BOREALIS** project demonstrates iterative refinement of control policies using **post-occupancy sensor data**, suggesting a **dynamic, adaptive time-scale** for evolving services."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as a **modular, service-oriented architecture** with three key roles:
  - **Building Control Engineers**: Model devices and configure control logic in BIM.
  - **Facility Managers**: Monitor and control operations via the DT.
  - **DT Engineers**: Extend functionality through custom services.
  The framework acts as a **central hub**, facilitating bidirectional data exchange between the physical building and its virtual twin. The **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric** is used to evaluate the constellation’s interoperability and architectural soundness."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT operates across **all life-cycle stages** of the building, from **design and construction** to **refurbishment and adaptive operations**. It covers representations of the physical counterpart in three key phases:
  - **As-designed (ideal)**: Leveraging BIM models for initial deployment.
  - **As-manufactured**: Incorporating real-time data from construction and commissioning phases.
  - **As-operated**: Continuously synchronizing with operational data (e.g., sensor readings, control signals) to enable adaptive management. The framework ensures **long-term compatibility** with AECO standards and existing systems."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric**: Quantifies the alignment between the DT and its physical counterpart.
  - **Automated validation** of BIM models before deployment.
  - **Real-time synchronization** via Eclipse Hono/Ditto to minimize drift.
  - **Uncertainty management**: Addressed through iterative refinement (e.g., **BOREALIS**’ reinforcement learning).
  The framework prioritizes **semantic coherence** and **bidirectional communication** to maintain high fidelity."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The **technical connection** between the physical twin (PT) and DT is established via:
  - **Eclipse Hono**: Provides **edge connectivity** and real-time data exchange.
  - **Eclipse Ditto**: Manages **digital twin instances** and ensures bidirectional communication.
  - **Standardized protocols**: Enabling interoperability between BIM, IoT sensors, and BCS.
  The connection supports **low-latency, high-fidelity data transmission** for both monitoring and control."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is hosted and deployed as a **modular, cloud-edge architecture**:
  - **Centralized deployment**: For large-scale building infrastructures.
  - **Edge deployment**: For latency-sensitive applications (e.g., lighting control).
  The framework automates deployment via **model-driven transformations**, reducing manual effort. **Unreal Engine 5** is used for **visualization hosting**, while **Eclipse Hono/Ditto** manage runtime operations."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The DT supports **horizontal integration** with external systems via:
  - **Standardized extension points** for third-party service integration.
  - **Interoperability with AECO standards** (e.g., BIM, IFC).
  - **Open-source frameworks** (e.g., Eclipse Hono/Ditto) for cross-platform compatibility.
  The framework ensures seamless data exchange with **other DTs, IoT platforms, or enterprise systems**."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to **AECO-specific standards**, including:
  - **Building Information Modeling (BIM)** as the semantic backbone.
  - **Industry Foundation Classes (IFC)** for data exchange.
  - **Eclipse Hono/Ditto** for standardized digital twin management.
  The framework also supports **modular extensibility** via predefined extension points, ensuring compliance with evolving standards."
]
